parameters.formDescription: Paste the job role and description below. Mistral AI will tailor your resume instantly!

values.placeholder: e.g. Senior Full-Stack Developer, React Native Engineer, Backend Developer
Paste the full job description here...

assignments.name: baseResume
assignments.value:
AVINASH SHARMA
Phone: +91 6201693634
Email: avinashsharma31384@gmail.com
GitHub: github.com/[your-github]
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/[your-linkedin]
Portfolio: [your-portfolio-url]
Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, 250005, India

─────────────────────────────────────
SUMMARY
─────────────────────────────────────
Full-Stack Developer with 2 internships building production web and mobile applications using MERN stack. Delivered 5+ projects including an Institute ERP with role-based access control and a course selling platform with secure authentication. Core strengths: Node.js/Express APIs, MongoDB, React.js, JWT authentication, and REST API design.

─────────────────────────────────────
TECHNICAL SKILLS
─────────────────────────────────────
Programming Languages: Java, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript
Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB (Mongoose), REST APIs, JWT Authentication, Socket.IO
Cloud and Tools: Firebase, Cloudinary, Git, Docker, Postman, VS Code
Systems & CS Fundamentals: Data Structures and Algorithms, OOP, DBMS, Operating Systems

─────────────────────────────────────
EXPERIENCE
─────────────────────────────────────
EpiCircle | Remote Full Stack Developer (React Native) | July 2025 – Present
- Developed scrap collection module in production React Native app, enabling real-time pickup scheduling and tracking.
- Refactored 15+ components improving code reusability; resolved 10+ production issues from user feedback.

Ideovent Technologies | Remote Software Developer Intern (Team Lead) | June 2025 – Sep 2025
- Led 4-person intern team to deliver 2 full-stack web applications within a 3-month deadline.
- Designed RESTful APIs with JWT-based authentication, balancing stateless security with frontend session persistence and role-based UI rendering.
- Built responsive frontend with React.js and Tailwind CSS; conducted 25+ code reviews.

─────────────────────────────────────
PROJECTS
─────────────────────────────────────
Institute ERP System | React (TypeScript), Node.js, MongoDB | GitHub
- Designed institute management platform with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for Admins, Teachers, and Students.
- Designed an end-to-end ERP system where frontend role-based dashboards were tightly coupled with backend RBAC middleware, ensuring authorization consistency across UI and APIs.

Course Selling Platform | MERN Stack, JWT, Rate Limiting | GitHub
- Built e-learning marketplace with 3-tier access control (Student, Admin, SuperAdmin) for secure course management.
- Implemented API rate limiting and JWT authentication middleware to prevent DDoS and ensure secure sessions.

Academic Notes Manager | MERN Stack, Cloudinary | GitHub
- Built a centralized academic repository enabling students to securely browse, search, and download course materials using role-based access control and Cloudinary-backed storage.

Pet Adoption Platform | React, Firebase (Firestore/Auth), React Hook Form | GitHub
- Built serverless adoption portal using Firebase for authentication and Firestore for real-time data synchronization.

─────────────────────────────────────
EDUCATION
─────────────────────────────────────
Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Information Technology | CGPA: 8.44 | 2022 – 2026
Swami Vivekanand Subharti University, Meerut

─────────────────────────────────────
CERTIFICATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────
- DSA with Java – NPTEL (2023)
- Java Programming – NPTEL (2024)
- Cloud Computing – NPTEL (2025)

assignments.name: fullPrompt
assignments.value:
=You are an expert resume writer and ATS optimization specialist.

Your task is to tailor the candidate's resume to perfectly match the given job role and job description.

STRICT RULES:
1. NEVER invent any new experience, skills, or projects not already in the resume.
2. Reorder and reframe existing bullet points to highlight what is MOST relevant to the job.
3. Mirror exact keywords and technologies from the job description wherever they genuinely match.
4. Rewrite the Summary section to be laser-targeted to this specific job role.
5. Keep all real facts (company names, dates, CGPA, certifications) exactly as they are.
6. Make bullet points stronger using action verbs and quantified results where possible.
7. If output format is Markdown: use proper headers (##), bold (**text**), and bullet points (-).
8. If output format is Plain Text: use ASCII separators (---) and no markdown symbols.
9. After the resume, add a section called TAILORING NOTES listing 3-5 key changes you made and why.

--- JOB ROLE ---
{{ $json.jobRole }}

--- JOB DESCRIPTION ---
{{ $json.jobDescription }}

--- CANDIDATE BASE RESUME ---
{{ $json.baseResume }}

--- OUTPUT FORMAT ---
{{ $json.outputFormat }}

Now produce the fully tailored resume followed by TAILORING NOTES:
